findings.title: Dangerous recursive delete
findings.message: Diff contains dangerous recursive delete command.

findings.title: Remote script pipe to shell
findings.message: Diff pipes remote content directly into shell.

findings.title: Possible secret leakage
findings.message: Diff appears to include a secret, token, password, or API key.

test_suggestions.title: Run unit tests
test_suggestions.description: Run service or frontend unit tests related to changed files.

test_suggestions.title: Run source integrity check
test_suggestions.description: Check project layout and ensure no source files are mixed into bundle directories.

test_suggestions.title: Run eval gateway regression
test_suggestions.description: Run platform eval cases after code changes.

test_suggestions.title: Secret scan
test_suggestions.description: Run secret scanning before commit or release.

test_suggestions.title: Manual approval required
test_suggestions.description: Dangerous shell operations require human approval and sandbox review.
